/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_dm1_v2_settings_pc34.dir/tests/test_dm1_v2_settings_pc34.c.o CMakeFiles/test_dm1_v2_settings_pc34.dir/src/dm1v2/dm1_v2_settings_pc34.c.o CMakeFiles/test_dm1_v2_settings_pc34.dir/src/dm1v2/dm1_v2_anim_timing_pc34.c.o -o test_dm1_v2_settings_pc34  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib libfirestaff_m12.a libfirestaff_m11.a libfirestaff_m10.a /usr/local/lib/libSDL3.so.0.2.24 -lm
